label: Economy V1
description: Core economy design for HoneyCoin, Pollen, Propolis, Royal Jelly, and social loops.

label: Active Mining
description: Primary HoneyCoin source from Nectar Node mining.

label: Offline Claim
description: Return-rate source from Bees working while player is away.

label: Repairs
description: HoneyCoin sink for restoring damaged or Propolis-state miners.

label: Power Upgrades
description: HoneyCoin sink for increasing Hive electrical capacity.

label: Queen Feeding
description: Prestige pathway where feeding the Queen creates long-term progression.

label: Queen Upgrades
description: Permanent upgrades purchased with Royal Jelly.

label: Wax
description: Crafting material earned from quests and salvaging old gear.

label: Nectar Shards
description: Upgrade material earned from events, trading, and rare drops.

label: Tribunal Marks
description: Skill/status currency earned from high-grade Tribunal results.

label: Halving System
description: Long-term cycle where base rewards fall and efficiency matters more.
